query: Which departments are underperforming in this year?
final_answer: Based on the available evidence, there is no direct, department-level breakdown identifying which specific departments at Infosys are underperforming this year. The evidence indicates that Infosys as a whole has experienced some underperformance relative to the broader IT - Software sector, with its stock marginally underperforming the sector by 0.42% (T6_web_0). Additionally, there have been reports of layoffs and performance management actions, including silent layoffs and performance improvement plans (PIP), which are typically targeted at underperforming employees or those on the bench, but no evidence specifies which departments are most affected (T7_web_10). The company has also reported strong overall Q3 performance, with sequential revenue growth and improved margins (T7_web_0, T6_web_8), suggesting that underperformance may not be broad-based across all departments. However, due to the lack of department-specific data, it is not possible to conclusively identify underperforming departments at Infosys for this year. This represents a limitation in the available evidence and should be considered a caveat in interpreting these findings.

chunk_id='T6_web_1' doc_id='https://www.whalesbook.com/news/English/tech/Infosys-Q3-Beats-Expectations-Lifts-FY26-Guidance-Eyes-Outperformance/6969b59b67b0aba2e82baec8' parent_chunk_id=None text="### Valuation Offers Upside

The company is actively building capacity, evident in a net headcount addition of over 5,000 employees despite lower utilization rates. With strong order flows, positive commentary on key sectors, and steady progress in AI, Infosys's stock, which has underperformed the broader market over the past year, now presents an undemanding valuation. Analysts have revised their rating from 'Equal weight' to 'Overweight', suggesting a potential for outperformance in the coming year. [...] ### Infosys Reports Strong Q3 FY26 Performance

Infosys has posted a robust performance in the third quarter of FY26, navigating seasonal headwinds effectively. Revenues saw sequential growth of 0.5 percent in reported currency and 0.6 percent in Constant Currency (CC). This positive execution, coupled with improved visibility for the final quarter, has prompted the company to revise its full-year guidance upwards.

### Guidance Raised, Margins Improve [...] ### AI Momentum and Sector Recovery

Infosys is witnessing a notable recovery in its Financial Services and Energy Utility segments. The company highlighted increasing discretionary demand in financials and anticipates stronger traction from BFSI and Energy sectors in 2026. AI-led work is steadily gaining momentum, with nearly 90 percent of its top 200 clients actively using AI. Infosys is collaborating with Cognition to deploy DEVIN, an AI software engineer, internally and with clients, underscoring its commitment to AI innovation.

PSEI news today might highlight specific figures or reports, but the underlying reasons are often multifaceted. One significant factor can be the digital transformation wave. If certain skill sets become less relevant, or if projects are completed, a company might need to make difficult decisions [...] their employment practices. So, when PSEI news today touches upon Infosys, it’s crucial to understand the context. Are these layoffs a sign of broader economic headwinds? Is Infosys restructuring to focus on more profitable areas? Or is it a targeted move due to specific project முடிவுகள் (results) or client demands? Understanding these layoffs requires looking beyond the immediate news and considering the strategic decisions Infosys is making in the current global economic climate. We need to dissect the information from PSEI news today to get a clearer picture of the scale, the departments affected, and the potential reasons behind these workforce adjustments. This isn’t just about job cuts; it’s about the future of the IT sector and how companies are adapting to an ever-changing [...] forget about efficiency and profitability targets. Publicly traded companies, especially those listed on exchanges like the PSEI, are always under pressure to meet financial targets and demonstrate growth to shareholders. If certain divisions or projects are not performing as expected, or if there are opportunities to optimize operational costs, management might resort to layoffs to improve the bottom line. ## पुढे काय?

HR क्षेत्रातील जाणकारांचं म्हणणं आहे की सध्याची पगाररचना फार काळ टिकणारी नाही. शिक्षण खर्च आणि शहरातील महागाईमुळे तरुण लवकर नोकरी सोडत आहेत. पहिल्या 12 ते 18 महिन्यांतच मोठ्या प्रमाणावर कर्मचारी नोकरी बदलत आहेत.

भविष्यात पगार हा केवळ अनुभवावर नाही, तर कौशल्यांवर ठरणार आहे. स्किल अपग्रेड, करिअर आणि उत्पादनक्षमतेशी जोडलेलं वेतन, यावरच आयटी क्षेत्राची पुढची दिशा अवलंबून असेल.

logo [...] ## पगार तोच… खर्च मात्र दुप्पट-तिप्पट वाढला

बेंगळुरू, हैदराबाद, पुणे यांसारख्या आयटी शहरांमध्ये राहणीमान खूप महाग झालं आहे. घरभाडं, अन्नधान्य, आरोग्य खर्च, प्रवास हे सगळंच वाढलं आहे. त्यामुळे नोकरी लागूनही अनेक तरुण काही महिन्यांतच आर्थिक ताण अनुभवायला लागतात.

HR तज्ज्ञांच्या मते, उद्योगाची कमाई वाढली, पण त्याचा फायदा फ्रेशर्सपर्यंत पोहोचलेला नाही. महागाई, शिक्षणाचा खर्च आणि शहरांतील महाग जीवनशैलीमुळे पगार पुरेनासा झाला.

## पदवीधरांची संख्या वाढली पगार मात्र कमी

यामागचं एक मोठं कारण म्हणजे इंजिनीअरिंग पदवीधरांची प्रचंड संख्या. दरवर्षी देशात सुमारे 15 लाखांहून अधिक इंजिनीअर विद्यार्थी बाहेर पडतात. मात्र त्यातील फार थोडेच थेट क्लायंट प्रोजेक्टसाठी तयार असतात. यामुळे कंपन्यांकडे उमेदवारांची भरपूर उपलब्धता असते आणि त्यामुळे कंपन्यांना पगारात वाढ करण्याची गरज वाटत नाही. # IT Salary 2026: TCS, Infosysमध्ये इंजिनिअर्सना कमी पगार का मिळतोय? एक्सपर्ट्सनी सांगितलं धक्कादायक कारण

IT Fresher Salary

IT Fresher Salary India: देशातील आयटी सेवा क्षेत्रात गेल्या वीस वर्षांत मोठी वाढ झाली. जागतिक प्रोजेक्ट्स, मोठ्या क्लायंट्स आणि कोट्यवधींची उलाढाल हे सगळं बदललं. मात्र एक गोष्ट मात्र तशीच राहिली आहे… ती म्हणजे फ्रेशर्सचा पगार.

आजही मोठ्या आयटी कंपन्यांमध्ये नव्या कर्मचाऱ्यांना मिळणारे सुरुवातीचे पॅकेज साधारण 3 ते 3.1 लाख रुपयांच्या आसपास आहे. हाच पगार 2008 च्या सुमारासही होता. तेव्हा Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) आणि Infosys सारख्या कंपन्यांनी फ्रेशर्ससाठी हे वेतन ‘स्टँडर्ड’ केलं होतं.

त्या काळात हा पगार चांगला मानला जात होता. कारण घरभाडं, जेवण, प्रवास आणि इतर खर्च तुलनेने कमी होता. पण आज चित्र पूर्णपणे बदललं आहे." retrieval_score=0.093620166 rerank_score=0.093620166 metadata={'url': 'https://pudhari.news/features/arthabhan/tcs-infosys-fresher-salaries-stuck-at-rs-3-lakh-for-nearly-two-decades-rs98', 'title': 'IT Fresher Salary India 2026: TCS, Infosys Entry Pay Still Around ₹3 Lakh|IT Salary 2026: TCS, Infosysमध्ये इंजिनिअर्सना कमी पगार का मिळतोय? एक्सपर्ट्सनी सांगितलं धक्कादायक कारण', 'source_type': 'web_search', 'tavily_score': 0.093620166} source_label='IT Fresher Salary India 2026: TCS, Infosys Entry Pay Still Around ₹3 Lakh|IT Salary 2026: TCS, Infosysमध्ये इंजिनिअर्सना कमी पगार का मिळतोय? एक्सपर्ट्सनी सांगितलं धक्कादायक कारण (https://pudhari.news/features/arthabhan/tcs-infosys-fresher-salaries-stuck-at-rs-3-lakh-for-nearly-two-decades-rs98)'

# After AI shock, West Asia war adds fresh stress to IT growth outlook

image for illustrative purpose

After AI shock, West Asia war adds fresh stress to IT growth outlook

X

2 March 2026 11:17 AM IST

Bengaluru: A raging conflict in West Asia may further complicate the demand recovery for Indian IT services companies, already grappling with disruption caused by the rapid adoption of artificial intelligence (AI). [...] According to analysts, a widening war involving Israel, Iran and the United States could destabilise global macroeconomic conditions by pushing up crude oil prices. While gold and silver prices may rise amid heightened uncertainty, technology spending, particularly in the oil and gas sector, is likely to come under pressure. Global oil prices have already been on an upward trajectory due to escalating tensions between the US and Iran. With the conflict intensifying, risks of further price spikes have increased. The Strait of Hormuz, through which over 20 per cent of global oil supply passes, has effectively come under threat of blockade, raising fears of supply disruptions. Brent crude settled at $72.48 per barrel on Friday.' retrieval_score=0.08716692 rerank_score=0.08716692 metadata={'url': 'https://www.bizzbuzz.news/technology/after-ai-shock-west-asia-war-adds-fresh-stress-to-it-growth-outlook-1386514', 'title': 'After AI shock, West Asia war adds fresh stress to IT growth outlook', 'source_type': 'web_search', 'tavily_score': 0.08716692} source_label='After AI shock, West Asia war adds fresh stress to IT growth outlook (https://www.bizzbuzz.news/technology/after-ai-shock-west-asia-war-adds-fresh-stress-to-it-growth-outlook-1386514)'

full_state.synthesis_output: task_id='T5' answer='Based on the available evidence, there is no direct, department-level breakdown identifying which specific departments at Infosys are underperforming this year. The evidence indicates that Infosys as a whole has experienced some underperformance relative to the broader IT - Software sector, with its stock marginally underperforming the sector by 0.42% (T6_web_0). Additionally, there have been reports of layoffs and performance management actions, including silent layoffs and performance improvement plans (PIP), which are typically targeted at underperforming employees or those on the bench, but no evidence specifies which departments are most affected (T7_web_10). The company has also reported strong overall Q3 performance, with sequential revenue growth and improved margins (T7_web_0, T6_web_8), suggesting that underperformance may not be broad-based across all departments. However, due to the lack of department-specific data, it is not possible to conclusively identify underperforming departments at Infosys for this year. This represents a limitation in the available evidence and should be considered a caveat in interpreting these findings.' citations=[Citation(chunk_id='T6_web_0', claim_text='Infosys as a whole has experienced some underperformance relative to the broader IT - Software sector, with its stock marginally underperforming the sector by 0.42%.', entailment_score=0.3793103448275862), Citation(chunk_id='T7_web_10', claim_text='There have been reports of layoffs and performance management actions, including silent layoffs and performance improvement plans (PIP), which are typically targeted at underperforming employees or those on the bench, but no evidence specifies which departments are most affected.', entailment_score=0.0), Citation(chunk_id='T7_web_0', claim_text='The company has also reported strong overall Q3 performance, with sequential revenue growth and improved margins.', entailment_score=0.0625), Citation(chunk_id='T6_web_8', claim_text='The company has also reported strong overall Q3 performance, with sequential revenue growth and improved margins.', entailment_score=0.0)] claims_count=6 citations_count=4 all_citations_in_evidence_board=False is_partial=False missing_dimensions=[] tokens_used=4301 cost_usd=0.064515
